query:
INSERT INTO rollRoomPrizes (rollRoomId, name, imageUrl, value, quantity, coinType, createdAt)
SELECT r.id, p.name, '', p.value, p.quantity, 'shopCoin', NOW()
FROM rollRooms r
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT '赤火传说皮肤' AS name, 500.00 AS value, 1 AS quantity UNION ALL
  SELECT '龙炎武器箱', 300.00, 2 UNION ALL
  SELECT '冰封手套', 200.00, 3 UNION ALL
  SELECT '战意头盔', 150.00, 2 UNION ALL
  SELECT '幸运金币x1000', 100.00, 5 UNION ALL
  SELECT '神秘礼包', 80.00, 3 UNION ALL
  SELECT '稀有皮肤碎片', 50.00, 10 UNION ALL
  SELECT '普通武器箱', 30.00, 5 UNION ALL
  SELECT '经验加成卡', 20.00, 8 UNION ALL
  SELECT '金币x100', 10.00, 20
) p
WHERE r.id IN (SELECT id FROM rollRooms ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 10);
